Headline: #95/95th Temporary Westbound Reroute near 95th/Bishop
ShortDescription: Westbound #95/95th buses are temporarily rerouted due to, police activity near 95th/Bishop.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Westbound #95/95th buses are temporarily rerouted via 95th, Vincennes, 99th, Beverly, and 95th due to police activity near 95th/Bishop.

Eastbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #67 67th-69th-71st Temporary Reroute at Damen/68th
ShortDescription: #67 67th-69th-71st buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to, police activity near Damen/68th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#67 67th-69th-71st buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to, police activity near Damen/68th.                                                                                               

#67 67th-69th-71st buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Western, 67th, Ashland, 69th, and Damen then over the normal route.

Allow extra travel time.
